BackstoryDef.title: arduous warrior
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was desperate to prove [PAWN_possessive] worth. To [PAWN_possessive] eyes, every little challenge or provocation was worth a violent display of power. [PAWN_pronoun] trained almost everyday to be able to fend off the best warrior of the tribe in a duel and finally show [PAWN_possessive] skills.\n\nThis day never came as the elders had always forbidden any useless bloodshed.

BackstoryDef.title: star watcher
BackstoryDef.description: After years of contemplating the night sky, [PAWN_nameDef] developed good skills to recognize and name constellations. People often relied on [PAWN_objective] for guidance when caravanning and [PAWN_pronoun] always took this opportunity to share [PAWN_possessive] knowledge. [PAWN_pronoun] often told stories to the tribe's children to explain to them how the stars and constellations formed.
